mainEntity.name: How to verify if Phoenix firm appears in ChatGPT responses?
mainEntity.text: How to verify if Phoenix firm appears in ChatGPT responses?

acceptedAnswer.text: Query ChatGPT with 'recommend Phoenix [practice] lawyers' variations 10x; check frequency and context of your firm's mentions.

suggestedAnswer.text: Use incognito, note versions. Tools like ChatGPT wrappers help log. Phoenix heat means consistent testing.

name: Verify Phoenix ChatGPT Visibility
description: Query ChatGPT with 'recommend Phoenix [practice] lawyers' variations 10x; check frequency and context of your firm's mentions.
